推荐场景: 项目风险会议｜识别风险
60秒任务: 「风险和阻碍」：背景/优先级/风险/行动项；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 优先级｜风险｜资源｜时间线｜行动项｜责任分配
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I see a potential risk with ___.（指出风险）
The blocker is not the task; it’s ___.（定位阻碍）
If we don’t address this, ___ could slip.（说明后果）
What’s the worst-case scenario?（询问最坏情况）
That dependency may slow us down.（依赖风险）
We need a mitigation plan.（要求缓解方案）
This isn’t a deal-breaker, but it needs attention.（评估风险程度）
Who can remove this blocker?（寻找负责人）
I’m concerned about the timing.（表达担忧）
Can we flag this before it becomes urgent?（提前升级）
Let’s be realistic about the risk.（现实评估）
What backup option do we have?（备用方案）
The issue is manageable if we ___.（条件性解决）
I’d rather raise it early than too late.（早暴露问题）
Let’s track the open risks.（记录风险）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: risk, blocker, dependency, issue, delay, timeline, backup plan, mitigation
Verbs: address, flag, escalate, slow down, slip, manage, track, remove
Adjectives / Status: high-risk, manageable, urgent, unresolved, critical, realistic
Time / Place: early, too late, before launch, this week, in the risk log
Chunks: worst-case scenario, deal-breaker, backup option, open risks, raise it early
